steps.title: Locate the highest bar on the graph
steps.content: The question asks for the highest percentage of lithium recovered across all tests shown. Scan all bars for both battery types and both processes. The bar for Type B, Process 2 extends the highest on the y-axis, reaching close to the 80% line — clearly above all other bars in the chart.

steps.title: Eliminate wrong choices and confirm the answer
steps.content:
Match each answer choice against what the graph shows:
  • Choice A — ‘75%.’: Closest to the Type B, Process 2 bar height of approximately 76%; this is the peak value on the chart. ✓
  • Choice B — ‘10%.’: Corresponds to one of the lowest bars on the chart, not the highest. ✗
  • Choice C — ‘45%.’: A mid-range bar value, not the highest recovery shown. ✗
  • Choice D — ‘20%.’: Another low bar value, well below the peak. ✗
That confirms A is correct.
